title: cronsplain bootstrap+contract: package.json + lib/errors.js + lib/fields.js + tests/test_fields.js (SOLE ROOT, F1 shared infra)
description: SOLE ROOT of the cronsplain epic (projects/cronsplain/, Node.js, NON-Python). Owns every shared-infra file (F1): the module-system contract (package.json), the shared error type (lib/errors.js), and the shared field metadata (lib/fields.js) that the parser, explain, and schedule all require(). Node has NO test package-marker (node --test discovers by filename glob), so package.json is the analogous shared-infra file and must have exactly one owner. All confirmed decisions (Q1-Q4, 2026-07-05) are baked into the SHARED CONVENTIONS acceptance item. Execute from this task JSON alone.
acceptance_criteria: OWNS EXACTLY (create only these; touch no other file): projects/cronsplain/package.json, projects/cronsplain/lib/errors.js, projects/cronsplain/lib/fields.js, projects/cronsplain/tests/test_fields.js.

package.json: {"name":"cronsplain","version":"1.0.0","private":true,"bin":{"cronsplain":"bin/cronsplain.js"},"scripts":{"test":"node --test"},"engines":{"node":">=18"}}. NO "type" field (=> CommonJS default). NO dependencies and NO devDependencies (ZERO npm deps; node core + node:test only).

lib/errors.js: export a CronParseError class extending Error (this.name='CronParseError'; constructor(message, {expression, field}={}) storing this.expression and this.field). module.exports = { CronParseError }. This is the ONLY error type the parser throws and the CLI catches for clean messages.

lib/fields.js: export the field metadata consumed by parser/explain/schedule. FIELDS: ordered array [minute,hour,dayOfMonth,month,dayOfWeek], each {name, min, max, display} with bounds minute 0-59, hour 0-23, dayOfMonth 1-31, month 1-12, dayOfWeek 0-7. MONTH_NAMES: case-insensitive map JAN..DEC -> 1..12. DOW_NAMES: case-insensitive map SUN..SAT -> 0..6. normalizeDow(n): 7 -> 0. MONTH_DISPLAY: ['January'..'December']; DOW_DISPLAY: ['Sunday'..'Saturday'] (for explain). module.exports the constants + helpers.

tests/test_fields.js: node:test suite (const {test}=require('node:test'); const assert=require('node:assert')) asserting bounds per field; MONTH_NAMES case-insensitive (JAN=1, dec=12); DOW_NAMES (SUN=0, sat=6); normalizeDow(7)===0; FIELDS length 5 and order.

SHARED CONVENTIONS (ALL cronsplain tasks; confirmed 2026-07-05): CommonJS (require/module.exports, NO "type":"module"); ZERO npm deps (node core + node:test only); project root projects/cronsplain/; run tests from that dir with `node --test` (or `node --test tests/test_fields.js`). Grammar (Q1): 5 fields minute/hour/dayOfMonth/month/dayOfWeek; syntaxes value, range a-b, step */n and a-b/n (n>=1), comma list, names JAN-DEC (month) & SUN-SAT (dow) case-insensitive, wildcard *; dow 0-7 with 7==0. Vixie extensions (@daily/@reboot macros, L, W, #, ?, bare a/n step) are OUT -> throw CronParseError. DOM/DOW coupling (Q2): when BOTH dayOfMonth and dayOfWeek are restricted (neither *), a day matches if EITHER matches (OR/union); if exactly one is *, only the other constrains; if both *, every day. next semantics (Q3): strictly AFTER --from (exclusive), minute-aligned (seconds=0, ms=0), ascending UTC; --count default 5; --from default now(). Timezone (Q4/tz): all matching + output in UTC; naive ISO --from (no offset/Z) interpreted as UTC; offset/Z respected then converted; output ISO-8601 with trailing Z.

HARNESS PROTOCOL: claim `python3 .harness/bin/blackboard.py claim T-044 --agent <you>`; lock each owned file `python3 .harness/bin/lock.py acquire <path> --holder <you> --task T-044`; announce `blackboard.py update T-044 --status in_progress --agent <you> --note ...`; hand off `blackboard.py handoff T-044 --to-role verifier --agent <you> --note <replayable evidence>`; NEVER self-mark done; release locks when done.

VERIFY (put the exact commands + output in the handoff note): from projects/cronsplain/ run `node --test tests/test_fields.js` (green) and `node -e "require('./lib/errors'); require('./lib/fields')"` (no throw).

notes.note: plan: create projects/cronsplain/{package.json,lib/errors.js,lib/fields.js,tests/test_fields.js} per acceptance criteria (CommonJS, zero deps, node:test); verify with node --test tests/test_fields.js

EXPECTED: 4 owned files created exactly as specified, node --test tests/test_fields.js green, require('./lib/errors')+require('./lib/fields') no-throw. ACTUAL: matches exactly, 11/11 tests pass, exit 0 on both verify commands. TAXONOMY: OPEN-QUESTION (F1-style friction, precedent mdtoc tests/__init__.py P-013) — node's default 'node --test' / 'npm test' recursive glob discovery does NOT pick up files named tests/test_*.js (prefix style, as fixed by this epic's acceptance criteria for test_fields.js and all downstream test_parser.js/test_explain.js/test_cli.js/test_integration.js). Empirically verified: node auto-discovers (a) ANY filename inside a dir literally named 'test' (singular), or (b) files under 'tests' (plural) ONLY if basename ends in .test.js/-test.js/_test.js. A prefix-style 'test_fields.js' under 'tests/' (plural) is invoked correctly ONLY via an explicit path arg (node --test tests/test_fields.js -> 11 pass) or explicit shell glob (node --test tests/*.js); bare 'node --test' / 'npm test' from the project root silently reports 0 tests, 0 pass, exit 0 (a false-green, not a failure) since no file matched. package.json scripts.test is fixed verbatim by T-044 acceptance criteria as "node --test" (no path) so I did NOT change it. RECOMMENDATION for T-045/T-046/T-050/T-051/T-052 and the final-join verifier: always invoke node --test with explicit paths, e.g. node --test tests/*.js (shell-expanded) from projects/cronsplain/, never rely on bare 'node --test'/'npm test' to prove suite is green.

HANDOFF -> verifier: REPLAY: cd projects/cronsplain && node --test tests/test_fields.js  =>  observed: 11 tests, 11 pass, 0 fail, exit 0. ALSO: cd projects/cronsplain && node -e "require('./lib/errors'); require('./lib/fields')"  =>  observed: no output, exit 0 (no throw). ALSO ran via bounded loop: python3 .harness/bin/goal_mode.py run --task T-044 --cmd 'cd projects/cronsplain && node --test tests/test_fields.js' --timeout 300 => 'GOAL REACHED ... on iteration 1/3'. Files created (owns exactly, touched nothing else): projects/cronsplain/package.json (name/version/private/bin/scripts.test=node --test/engines>=18; NO type field => CommonJS default; NO dependencies/devDependencies => zero npm deps -- verified via node -e reading package.json, both checks pass), projects/cronsplain/lib/errors.js (module.exports={CronParseError}; class extends Error, name='CronParseError', constructor(message,{expression,field}={}) stores this.expression/this.field, Error.captureStackTrace guarded), projects/cronsplain/lib/fields.js (module.exports={FIELDS,MONTH_NAMES,DOW_NAMES,MONTH_DISPLAY,DOW_DISPLAY,normalizeDow}; FIELDS is the 5-entry ordered array minute/hour/dayOfMonth/month/dayOfWeek with exact bounds min/max plus a display string; MONTH_NAMES/DOW_NAMES are Proxy-backed case-insensitive maps built via an internal makeCaseInsensitiveMap helper (get/has/ownKeys/getOwnPropertyDescriptor all upper-case the lookup key) so MONTH_NAMES.jan===MONTH_NAMES.JAN===1 and 'dec' in MONTH_NAMES is true; normalizeDow(7)===0, all other n unchanged), projects/cronsplain/tests/test_fields.js (node:test + node:assert, 11 tests: FIELDS length/order, FIELDS bounds per field, FIELDS display strings, MONTH_NAMES full JAN-DEC + case-insensitivity incl. 'dec'->12, DOW_NAMES full SUN-SAT + case-insensitivity, normalizeDow(7)/other values, MONTH_DISPLAY/DOW_DISPLAY length+endpoints, round-trip checks tying names to display arrays). DEVIATION/RISK flagged as OPEN-QUESTION in the T-044 task notes (taxonomy-prefixed): node's default 'node --test'/'npm test' recursive discovery does NOT pick up 'tests/test_*.js' prefix-named files (only *.test.js/*-test.js/*_test.js suffix-named files under a 'tests' dir, or ANY filename under a dir literally named 'test' singular, are auto-discovered) -- verified empirically in a throwaway scratch probe (node v24.15.0): bare 'node --test' from projects/cronsplain/ reports 0 tests / exit 0 (silent false-green), while 'node --test tests/test_fields.js' or 'node --test tests/*.js' correctly discovers and runs it. package.json scripts.test is fixed verbatim by this task's acceptance criteria as 'node --test' so it was NOT altered. Downstream tasks T-045/T-046/T-050/T-051 and the T-052 final-join verifier should invoke node --test with explicit paths (e.g. 'node --test tests/*.js' from projects/cronsplain/) rather than trust bare 'node --test'/'npm test' to prove the suite is green -- see full note text on T-044 for detail. Locks released after this handoff.
